projects.title: Wazuh Home Lab SIEM — Full-Stack Security Monitoring & Detection Platform
projects.description: Deployed a production-grade SIEM/XDR platform on Ubuntu 22.04 using Wazuh v4.14.5, standing up the full Wazuh stack (Manager, Indexer, Dashboard) and enrolling multiple monitored endpoints including a Fedora Linux workstation. Configured File Integrity Monitoring (FIM) across critical system paths (/etc, /bin, /sbin, /boot), Security Configuration Assessment (SCA), vulnerability detection with hourly CVE feed updates, rootcheck for rootkit and trojan detection, and active response — automating firewall-drop blocks on SSH brute-force triggers (rule 5712, 30-minute ban). Built a custom Python Discord integration that parses Wazuh alert JSON and fires formatted real-time notifications (severity, source host, rule description) to a private security channel. Extended the ruleset with custom detection rules: a Level 12 canary file trap using Linux auditd to detect any unauthorized access to AWS credentials, and application-layer monitoring rules for a live trading agent's error and auth failure events. Integrated GCP Pub/Sub to ingest cloud logs from the gorillac-site GCP project directly into the SIEM pipeline.
projects.outcome: Multi-endpoint SIEM with real-time Discord alerting, a canary-based AWS credential access trap, GCP cloud log ingestion, automated firewall active response, and custom application-layer detection rules — demonstrating end-to-end threat detection from rule authoring through real-time alert delivery.

projects.title: Job Application Tracker — Gmail-Integrated Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Built a full-stack job application tracking system that ingests applications from CSV and live Gmail inbox monitoring, parses email status signals (received, rejected, interview, offer) using regex-based NLP, and stores records in a MySQL backend via SQLAlchemy. Implemented a real-time Plotly Dash dashboard with status breakdowns, weekly application volume trends, company-level response rate analysis, and a searchable/filterable data table. The Gmail monitor polls the inbox on a configurable interval, parses each email through a multi-stage transform pipeline, and auto-classifies application status — keeping the database current without manual entry.
projects.outcome: End-to-end pipeline from inbox to insight — Gmail emails are auto-parsed and status-classified, CSV bulk imports are deduplicated on ingest, and the live dashboard surfaces response rates, rejection trends, and weekly cadence at a glance.

projects.title: Job Copilot — AI-Powered Job Search, Scoring Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack job intelligence platform that leverages AI to search for, score, and list job postings from multiple sources (Greenhouse, Lever, Remotive, RemoteJobs.io, USAJobs). The platform uses AI to score experience for relevance against requirements. Implemented a Playwright-based automated application engine that fills and submits Greenhouse and Lever application forms — including custom question handling via Claude — with CAPTCHA detection, screenshot audit trails, and per-attempt status tracking. Deployed as a Dockerized FastAPI app with a Jinja2 UI, SQLAlchemy ORM, MySQL backend, and Alembic migrations.
projects.outcome: AI-driven pipeline that searches, scores, and lists high-fit jobs. Claude handles custom form questions, while the platform maintains a live list of scored opportunities with audit trails for every submission.

projects.title: Cloud-Hosted Portfolio Site — IaC on GCP (gorillac.net)
projects.description: Designed and deployed a production-grade personal portfolio site on GCP with all infrastructure defined as code in Terraform. Resources provisioned include: a GCS bucket with versioning and static website hosting, a Cloud CDN-backed backend bucket for edge caching, a globally reserved static IP, path-based URL map routing (serving static assets from GCS while routing /api/contact to a Cloud Run backend service), a Google-managed SSL certificate covering gorillac.net and www.gorillac.net, HTTPS and HTTP target proxies, and global forwarding rules on ports 80 and 443 with automatic HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect. All assets are uploaded and managed as Terraform resources with correct MIME types and IAM public read access.
projects.outcome: Fully reproducible, zero-click infrastructure — a single `terraform apply` provisions and wires the entire stack. Live at gorillac.net with sub-second global load times via CDN edge caching.

projects.title: Enterprise Application Security — Pasco County BOCC
projects.description: Architected secure enterprise web applications serving 5,000+ county users. Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC) to harden application perimeter.
projects.outcome: 35% reduction in unauthorized access exposure risk; 25–30% decrease in development lifecycle timelines.

projects.title: Cloud Security & Compliance Engineering — Hillsborough County BOCC
projects.description: Engineered secure workloads across Azure and GCP environments. Conducted penetration testing and vulnerability assessments. Integrated automated SAST/DAST scanning into CI/CD pipelines.
projects.outcome: 20%+ reduction in manual detection effort; measurable decrease in OWASP Top 10 exposure across application environments.

projects.title: Vulnerability Management Support — Rapid7
projects.description: Served as a Technical Support Engineer supporting enterprise customers deploying and troubleshooting Rapid7's vulnerability management platform. Diagnosed complex network and product issues within vulnerability scanning infrastructure, developed log analysis workflows using regex to investigate reported issues, and acted as liaison between customers and Engineering/Product teams to drive resolutions. Built deep subject-matter expertise in InsightVM to support customers across diverse hybrid environments.
projects.outcome: Reduced customer vulnerability resolution timelines and improved scan infrastructure reliability through structured troubleshooting workflows and cross-functional escalation.

projects.title: Vulnerability Analysis Blog
projects.description: A hands-on technical blog series covering practical vulnerability analysis and security testing workflows for DevSecOps practitioners. Posts cover: (1) structured vulnerability management using Tenable — scanning, triage, and business-context-driven prioritization; (2) integrating the OWASP Top 10 (2021) into analysis workflows using OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Nessus, and Qualys to map findings and communicate risk; (3) a full seven-stage penetration testing workflow with Metasploit — from reconnaissance through post-exploitation and reporting.
projects.outcome: Publicly documented, end-to-end security research demonstrating hands-on expertise in vulnerability identification, exploitation validation, risk prioritization, and remediation — moving beyond theoretical knowledge into real-world threat confirmation.

projects.title: Healthcare Infrastructure Hardening — Florida Dept. of Health
projects.description: Maintained HIPAA-aligned critical infrastructure. Implemented firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and endpoint hardening. Managed patch governance and SQL Server optimization.
projects.outcome: Improved network security posture and system stability across mission-critical healthcare environments.
